name: Confetti Cake & Cupcake Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Celebrate every bite. Make fluffy confetti cupcakes or cake with nostalgic cake batter flavor and a pop of color from dye-free sprinkles. This quick, no-mixer-needed mix is made with Supernatural® sprinkles, colored with vibrant, plant-based ingredients instead of synthetic dyes. It’s an easy way to bring a little extra fun to birthdays, celebrations, or any day that calls for something cheerful. Makes : Makes 12 cupcakes, two 6” round layers, or one 8” round layer Six 4" Whoopie Pies 18 Cake Pops Nutrition Label View Product Packaging (.pdf)

name: Confetti Sugar Cookie Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Soft cookies, sprinkled with joy! Imagine your favorite sugar cookie: soft and chewy with classic cake batter flavor. Add dye-free sprinkles from our friends at Supernatural®, made with vibrant plant-based colors, and you’ve got a cookie that feels like a celebration. Our Confetti Sugar Cookie Mix comes together quickly — no mixer needed — for fun, festive cookies (or a cookie cake!) anytime. name: Gluten-Free Roll & Bun Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Soft, fluffy and gluten-free. Warm, tender rolls — without a long wait! Our Gluten-Free Roll & Bun Mix bakes up soft and fluffy buns that are full of flavor. Ready to bake in about an hour, it's easy to have fresh bread on the table any night of the week! Perfect alongside soup, as a base for burgers, or served at a holiday dinner, these rolls and buns are ideal for any meal — and surprisingly gluten-free. Each box makes 16 rolls or 12 buns, giving you plenty to share (or save for later!). name: Gluten-Free Double Chocolate Chip Cookie Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Seriously Soft. Seriously Chocolatey. Meet the gluten-free cookie sure to satisfy every chocolate lover! Our Gluten-Free Double Chocolate Chip Cookie Mix features a blend of rich cocoas and plenty of semisweet chocolate chips for cookies that bake up soft, fudgy, and deeply chocolatey. They’re so good, no one will guess they’re gluten-free! Ready in about 20 minutes, this mix makes 12 large cookies or 48 mini treats. You can also turn it into 16 Gluten-Free Seven-Layer Bars or 6 large Gluten-Free Chocolate Pistachio Cookies. Makes : 12 gluten-free cookies or 48 mini cookies 16 Gluten-Free Seven-Layer Bars 6 large Gluten-Free Chocolate Pistachio Cookies Nutrition Label View Product Packaging (.pdf)

name: Banana Bread Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Simple, classic banana bread in no time. Enjoy a cozy loaf of banana bread in under an hour — just add water, oil, and eggs. Real bananas and a hint of cinnamon create a tender, perfectly sweet quick bread that’s delicious on its own or easy to customize with chocolate chips, nuts, or any favorite additions. Bake it as a loaf or turn it into muffins — it’s a reliable, comforting treat for breakfast, with coffee, or anytime you want something warm and homemade. name: Coffee Cake Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Coffee cake ready in under an hour! Warm, buttery, and filled with cinnamon goodness, this classic coffee cake delivers the comfort of a homemade treat with little effort. Inside, a thick ribbon of cinnamon swirls through the center, topped off with a generous, crunchy crumble topping. Quick and easy to bake in under an hour, this convenient mix only needs butter, eggs, and milk. Perfect for breakfast, a coffee break, or dessert, it’s the kind of cake that impresses without the fuss. Serving suggestion : finish the coffee cake with a dusting of confectioner's sugar or a vanilla glaze, if desired. Nutrition Label View Product Packaging (.pdf)

name: Quick & Easy Panna Cotta Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker An elegant dessert made simple. A small-batch release available for a limited time only. Create an elegant, restaurant-quality dessert at home with our Quick & Easy Panna Cotta Mix! Smooth, creamy, and lightly sweet, this classic Italian treat comes together in just a few simple steps using basic ingredients. Delicious on its own or paired with fresh fruit and toppings, it’s a foolproof choice for effortless entertaining. For a traditional touch, unmold from a ramekin and impress your guests with a beautiful presentation. Try with our Pure Vanilla Plus for a classic flecked vanilla look. Nutrition Label View Product Packaging (.pdf)

name: Butterscotch Blondie Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Bake-and-go butterscotch bliss! Sweet, chewy, and loaded with rich butterscotch flavor, our Butterscotch Blondie Mix bakes up irresistibly fudgy bars with golden edges and a soft center. Made with butterscotch chips for a deep caramel-like sweetness, they’re easily customizable with your favorite mix-ins — try chocolate or a handful of chopped nuts to make it your own! You’ll find our maple glaze recipe on the back of the box. Nutrition Label View Product Packaging (.pdf)

name: Classic Chewy Bagel Mix Kit
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Fresh-from-the-oven bagels made easy! Warm, chewy, and ready in just an hour, these homemade bagels bring bagel-shop goodness to your kitchen with ease — simply add water! Each batch makes eight bagels with a crisp, golden crust and soft, chewy interior. Delicious on their own, perfect for breakfast sandwiches, and great for customizing with mix-ins or toppings. Click on the Classic Chewy Bagels Recipe below for tips to add our Cinnamon Sweet Bits or Blueberry Jammy Bits ! Makes : 8 Bagels 16 Cream Cheese-Stuffed Bagel Pockets 12 Everything Bagel Twists 24 Mini Pizza Bagels 3 cups Bagel Chips Nutrition Label View Product Packaging (.pdf)

name: Crisp & Airy Focaccia Mix Kit
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Experience the joy of bread baking with our Focaccia Mix Kit! Baking fresh focaccia has never been easier or faster! In just about an hour, you'll savor the soft, airy texture and irresistible crisp crust of homemade focaccia. This easy-to-assemble mix kit includes Focaccia Mix, a yeast packet, along with a rosemary and sea salt blend for topping. Simply add water and oil and follow instructions for a hassle-free process. Gather everyone for a fun-filled baking session and explore the endless possibilities of this versatile mix kit. From the recipe on the back of the box to new recipes online , there are plenty of ways to let your creativity shine! We like using any leftover rosemary and sea salt to create a flavorful dipping oil for the focaccia. Makes : One 9” x 13” or one half-sheet (13” x 18”) Rosemary Sea Salt Focaccia or Golden Potato Focaccia Two 11” or 9” x 13” pizzas 24 breadsticks Nutrition Label View Product Packaging (.pdf)

name: Pull-Apart Garlic Bread Mix Kit
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Experience the joy of bread baking with our Pull-Apart Garlic Bread Mix Kit! Baking fresh Pull-Apart Garlic Bread has never been easier or faster! In just about an hour, you can enjoy the irresistible delight of cheesy Pull-Apart Garlic Bread with the help of our convenient mix kit! This tender treat is filled with a savory blend of herby, buttery goodness, making it the perfect accompaniment to any meal or a satisfying snack on its own. Our convenient kit includes the essentials: a pull-apart bread mix, yeast packet, and garlic bread seasoning, ensuring a hassle-free baking experience. Simply add water and butter to the mix, and you're on your way to enjoying warm, garlic-bread perfection straight from your oven. From the recipe on the back of the box to new recipes online , there are plenty of ways to let your creativity shine! Try new toppings and fillings, like caramelized onions, cured meats, and sautéed vegetables. To make this mix even more time efficient, allow the dough to rise overnight in the refrigerator after shaping, then top and bake as directed the next day. Makes : One 8” square or 9” round loaf – regular or cheese-filled 10 biscuits or 24 mini biscuits Nutrition Label View Product Packaging (.pdf)

name: Apple-Cinnamon Whole Grain Muffin and Quick Bread Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Apple Cinnamon Muffins made with buttermilk for an even more tender crumb and delectable flavor. Fragrant with spicy cinnamon and studded with dried apple bits, these tender and light muffins taste just like fall-—and you can enjoy the seasonal flavor all year long! Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO. name: Deliciously Simple Chocolate Cake Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Convenient, easy and chocolatey, our cake mix bakes into a moist, delicious dessert. Moist and fudgy with a velvety texture and rich cocoa flavor, this chocolate cake mix makes the ultimate chocolate cake. Reach for it when you're in a hurry, or want a cake that you know will never fail and everyone will love! Simply stir together eggs, oil, water, and our cake mix, then bake. Finish it off however you like; layer and frost it or sprinkle it with confectioners' sugar. Adding a cup of chocolate chips wouldn't hurt, either! Try more Chocolate Cake Mix recipes here ! name: Shortbread Cookie Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Traditional buttery, not-overly-sweet shortbread. Only three things are necessary to have traditional buttery, not-overly-sweet shortbread cookies in minutes: our mix, some butter, and your love and care. Our simple mix makes baking memories easier than ever: just mix in the butter, pat into pan, and bake. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? name: All-American Fudge Brownie Mix
description: Product information Description Specs Care & Storage Ingredients, Nutrition, and Allergens About The Maker Deep, dark, rich brownies are just a few steps away with our easy mix. Our premium brownie mix is made with unbleached King Arthur Flour and a blend of flavorful cocoas. Just add eggs, butter or vegetable oil, and water, and you're well on your way to delicious, chocolatey, homemade brownies! Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO. Perfect Pairing : Cyprus Flake Sea Salt - Elevate your brownies with a touch of flaky sea salt. High Altitude Baking: Keep oven temperature at 325 ° F. Use a 9-inch square pan if adding nuts or chips to the recipe. 6 tablespoons melted butter yields better results than oil. If you wish to use oil, add another tablespoon of water. 3500 to 5000 feet - For Fudgy Brownies: Add 1 tablespoon flour and 1 tablespoon unsweetened cocoa to the mix. Use 1 extra large plus 1 large egg. For Cakey Brownies: Keep oven temperature at 325 ° F. Use a 9-inch square pan. 8 tablespoons melted butter. 3 tablespoons water. 2 extra large plus 1 large egg. Add 1 tablespoon flour and 1 tablespoon unsweetened cocoa to the mix. 5000 to 7000 feet - For Fudgy Brownies: Add 2 tablespoons flour plus 2 tablespoons unsweetened cocoa. Use 1 extra large plus 1 large egg. For Cakey Brownies: Keep oven temperature at 325 ° F. Use a 9-inch square pan. 9 tablespoons melted butter, ¼ cup water, 2 extra large plus 1 large egg. Add 2 tablespoons flour, 2 tablespoons unsweetened cocoa, and 1 tablespoon Instant ClearJel to the mix. 7000 to 9500 feet - For Fudgy Brownies: Add 3 tablespoons flour and 3 tablespoons unsweetened cocoa. Increase eggs to 3 large. For Cakey Brownies: Keep oven temperature at 325 ° F. Use a 9-inch square pan. 10 tablespoons melted butter. ¼ cup water. 3 extra large eggs. Add 3 tablespoons flour, 3 tablespoons unsweetened cocoa, and 2 tablespoons Instant ClearJel to the mix. Nutrition Label View Product Packaging (.pdf)
